items.title: Maritime risk level 2 (caution) in Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: Advisory indicates occasional drone/boat activity near shipping lanes; no direct impact to Dubai. Monitoring ongoing.

items.title: Reported explosion near Bandar Abbas, Iran
items.summary: Local sources reported a single explosion overnight; cause unconfirmed. No spillover reported toward UAE.

items.title: OMDB 12R/30L nightly maintenance 02:00–05:00 local
items.summary: Minor taxi/runway sequencing delays possible; airport operating normally.

items.title: Dust and strong wind advisory (Gulf of Oman)
items.summary: Visibility may reduce to 3–5 km on coastal roads late evening; monitor local RTA advisories.

items.title: Routine siren test scheduled Friday 12:00
items.summary: This is a test; no action needed beyond awareness.

items.title: Houthi drones intercepted over the Red Sea; no effect on UAE airspace
items.summary: Regional air defense activity noted; airlines report schedules to/from DXB remain normal.

morning.notes: No direct or imminent threats to Dubai identified in this scan window.

items.title: Maritime advisory unchanged (level 2) for Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: Caution remains in place; shipping traffic normal.

items.title: Low visibility pockets due to dust on E11 and E311
items.summary: Drive with headlights on; maintain safe distance; expect slower traffic.

items.title: Runway maintenance completed on schedule
items.summary: No significant delays; throughput normal for evening peak.

items.title: Isolated air defense activity reported in southwestern Iran
items.summary: No spillover or warnings for UAE.

items.title: Travel advice unchanged
items.summary: Remain aware of regional developments; follow local authority instructions.

items.title: Regional shipping reports brief precautionary reroutings
items.summary: No direct impact to UAE ports reported; Jebel Ali operations normal.

evening.notes: Status steady; situational awareness recommended. No NCEMA emergency instructions issued for Dubai.
